query:
ALTER TABLE ingredients 
ADD COLUMN isSalaItem TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 AFTER is_food,
ADD COLUMN subcategory VARCHAR(255) AFTER isSalaItem,
ADD COLUMN packageUnit ENUM('u', 'k') AFTER packageSize;
